what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a design-source channel to an image resource identified by image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-15, recording the attachment type and creation timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares id att-a9ea161e, channel design-source, attachment_type images, and target image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-15.
The added timestamp is 2026-06-22T11:31:00.457189+00:00 with explicit UTC offset.
It uses a custom image:// URI scheme to refer to the attached resource.
standouts: Custom image:// URI target pointing to design-source/deck1-2026/p-15.
Attachment typed as images within the design-source channel.
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter metadata convention with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Markdown file with empty body acts as a structured ledger entry.
Breaks typical markdown convention by having no readable content or title.
notes: A bare metadata stub that records an image attachment to the design-source channel at a specific point in time.
questions: What content is represented by image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-15?
How is the image:// URI scheme resolved or stored?
What is the lifecycle or versioning policy for this attachment?
Is there a human-readable caption or title missing from this record?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches what it does: it stores metadata linking a channel to an image target.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped association between a design-source channel entry and a specific image slide/page so the image can be retrieved in context.
novelty: The use of a custom image:// URI scheme and a channel-memory attachment file as a first-class ledger record rather than embedding or linking the image inline.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, typed link between the design-source channel and an external image resource, preserving the attachment identity and creation time for cross-referencing and audit.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter-only channel attachment record in the design-source channel that references the image resource image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-15 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image attachment was added to the design-source channel at 2026-06-22T11:31:00Z for later retrieval and contextual association.
